other_observers: None; Original observer; no other known observers
specific_location: NW corner of Bonny Lake State Park, at the intersection of CR 3 and Hwy 385
description: Very long-tailed passerine with salmon-colored vent and sides, dark wings, white breast and throat and whitish-grey head. All black bill not particularly long or short, nor stout or thin.Behaviors: 1st noticed perched on a powerline, then flew down to ground and apparently caught a food item before returning to perch on wire where photo was then obtained.Call: None observedPlumage: Adult
